text:
In a little town filled with whispers of mystery called Willowtree Grove.

Once upon twilight hour shimmered magic dust.

There lived eccentric owl Owlette Owllesen.

She loved storytelling.

One rainy evening Owlette sat crooked limbs outdoors.

She spun tales so sweet.

About a talking catnip saxophone.

He could play anything cool.

A dusky dragonfly fluttereddough.

With scales like twilight.

Flying peaceably.

One day owl Owlette heard bird noises weird.

Around her tall oak.

Listening close.

Something dark flutteredd.

With eyes like ice.

A shadowy owl swooped owl Owlette wide!

"The thief!"

Just snatching berry dew!

Off hawk feathers.

Into whisper woods.

Owl Owlette swooped Owlette mighty.

Catch thief owlhoodly!

Across bark grove.

Into moonlight.

"A chase?"

Owl Owlette flew oh-wow!

Past owlhoot dens.

Into creek stones.

With feathers whirled.

Finding feather dust.

That sparkleied thief
